title: Business owners invited to BNI visitor's day
description: GEORGE NEWS - The George chapter of BNI...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - The George chapter of BNI wishes to remind business owners in George and surrounds of the BNI visitor's day on Friday 12 April, at 07:30 at the George Golf Club.


> BNI is an international networking organisation specialising in business referrals among members and a great way for businesses to experience growth by maximising marketing efforts through word of mouth.


The organisation generated over 15 million referrals for members in 2023 alone and in the same period in South Africa, BNI members generated over R800m's worth of business for fellow members.

BNI was founded in 1985 by acclaimed business author Dr Ivan Misner.

His books include Masters of Networking, Masters of Success, Masters of Sales, Truth or Delusion, The 29% Solution, Networking Like a Pro, Money on the Table, and Business Networking & Sex (not what you think!).

"Our style of networking is based on the philosophy Givers Gain®: If I help you, then you'll help me, and we'll all do better business," says Misner.

All business owners are welcome at the visitors' day.

WhatsApp your name and business name to 082 657 4539 for more information and visit www.bnisoutherncape.co.za.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
